mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, enabled, start_at, end_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM announcement_config ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, title, content, enabled, start_at, end_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM announcement_config WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO announcement_config (id, title, content, enabled, start_at, end_at, updated_by, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{content}, #{enabled}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{updatedBy}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE announcement_config SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, enabled = #{enabled}, start_at = #{startAt}, end_at = #{endAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
